heading: Confidential business information
label: 4088 Confidential business information
text: The President may not release information received in connection with a review under this part which the President considers to be confidential business information unless the party submitting the confidential business information had notice, at the time of submission, that such information would be released by the President, or such party subsequently consents to the release of the information. To the extent a party submits confidential business information, it shall also provide a nonconfidential version of the information in which the confidential business information is summarized or, if necessary, deleted.
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section by , see Effective and Termination Dates note below.section 107(d) of Pub. L. 109–53
